title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
summary: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.

title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
summary: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.

title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
summary: Heavy selling pushed XRP back below a key support zone, reinforcing a downtrend that has repeatedly stalled rallies near $1.25.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin and precious metals remain under pressure
summary: About 20% of miners are now unprofitable, and publicly traded miners sold more than 32,000 bitcoin in the first quarter to cover operating costs, more than they offloaded in all of 2025.

title: Bitcoin traders load up on bearish bets all the way down to $52,000
summary: Bitcoin traders are scrambling to buy options bets that would pay off if the selloff deepens.
